foreword.title: A Strategy for Transformation
foreword.quote: Gender equality is not just a goal in itself — it is the foundation for sustainable development.
foreword.body1: This strategy sets out UNDP's commitment to gender equality across all programmatic areas from 2026 to 2029.
foreword.body2: It builds on lessons learned and charts a course for deeper, more systemic change.

download.title: Download the Full Strategy
download.subtitle: Available in six official UN languages
